info.description: Every piece of copy on /free/nervous-system-decoder/quiz, fully CMS-editable. Hero, button labels, the 5 questions and their A/B/C answers, the email gate copy, the 3 result pages, and the practice labels. The only thing in code is the scoring logic (A=Clear, B=Scrambled, C=Faint) and the colour palette per result.

eyebrow.description: Small uppercase label above the title on the intro screen.

title.description: Main heading on the intro screen.

intro.default: Five short questions. Answer honestly. At the end we will read where your inner guidance system is right now, and give you a practice you can use today.
intro.description: Intro paragraph on the first screen, above the Begin button.

begin_button_label.description: Text on the button that starts the quiz.

questions.description: The 5 quiz questions, in order. Each question has A/B/C answers. Keep this at 5 questions — the scoring rule (A≥3 → Clear, else B≥C → Scrambled, else Faint) assumes 5. You can edit the text of any question or any answer freely. If the order or count changes, ping Sameer first.

email_gate_title.default: Where would you like your result?
email_gate_title.description: Heading on the email capture screen (between Q5 and the result reveal).

email_gate_intro.default: Pop your email in, and your result, your practice, and a follow-up are yours.
email_gate_intro.description: Paragraph under the email gate heading.

email_gate_button_label.description: Text on the button that reveals the result after email capture.

email_gate_fineprint.default: One short email. Unsubscribe any time.
email_gate_fineprint.description: Small italic line under the email submit button.

practice_label_clear.default: A short meditation to stay clear
practice_label_clear.description: Small uppercase label above the practice block on the Signal Clear result page.

practice_label_scrambled.description: Small uppercase label above the practice block on the Signal Scrambled result page.

practice_label_faint.description: Small uppercase label above the practice block on the Signal Faint result page.

price_microcopy.description: Italic line shown under the REGULATED CTA on the Scrambled + Faint result pages.

results.description: Three result blurbs, one per state (clear / scrambled / faint). Don't add or remove entries — the scoring logic expects exactly 3. Title, blurb, practice text, meditation URL, and CTA ARE editable.
